dependency_context_notes: References specific pytest source file (python.py line 466), pluggy's call_extra feature, conftest.py, and doc files (writing_hook_functions.rst, parametrize.rst). However, PR description is truncated at 'Added `tes' so incomplete list of changes.
outcome_clarity_notes: PRESENT: Clear that the goal is to document and test the special discovery behavior of pytest_generate_tests (only hook discoverable in test modules without conftest/plugins). AMBIGUOUS: PR description is cut off mid-sentence ('Added `tes'), so the complete scope of documentation and test changes is unclear.
scope_boundaries_notes: PRESENT: Explicit that this is about pytest_generate_tests as an exception, not other hooks. NOT IN SCOPE: Implementation changes (docs/tests only). PARTIAL: Unclear what 'minimal self-test' means exactly—which test file, what does it validate?
acceptance_criteria_notes: PARTIALLY PRESENT: Implied success criteria (docs updated in 2 files, test added), but no explicit Given/When/Then. No pass/fail criteria stated. No specifics on what the test should assert or verify.
behavioral_specificity_notes: PARTIAL: Specifies that pytest_generate_tests uses pluggy's call_extra feature and is discovered in test modules/classes (not just conftest/plugins). Vague: what 'minimal self-test' does, what 'short reminder' entails, what exactly was added to the doc files.
missing_or_ambiguous: Complete list of changes (PR description truncated)
Definition of 'minimal self-test'—what file, what assertions?
Exact doc wording or diffs for the two doc files
No error states, edge cases, or boundary conditions mentioned
No data contracts (not applicable to docs/tests change)
